transcript.text:
Tzuyang? China? Is she Chinese?
She's here today? That's amazing
We're going to run out of ingredients
[Buckwheat noodles with 60 years of tradition]
57 years to be exact
This is the only place here
They sell a thousand bowls in the Summer
[Chulwon's well-known noodle place]
[I'm here to try it]
[Getting ready to film]
[Video call]
Hello everyone~
I'm here at Chulwon today
I'm here to do some charity work/community service
But I was told that there's a really famous noodle place here with 60 years of tradition
I'm here since I have some spare time

It's different than your average buckwheat noodles
You can't have this anywhere else
It gets so crowded here in the Summer
[Crowded]
On their menu, they have
Buckwheat noodles with/without broth, Boiled Meat (usually pork), mung bean pancake, and steamed dumplings
Let's try 1 of each since I need to go work after
I wash this here and move it here after
60 years man, 60 years
It's 60 years! 60 years!
Grandmother used to sell these for like 10-20 cents per bowl
Thank you
Mom said that she's incredible
She's skinny but she eats a lot
[This is nothing]
Let's try the buckwheat noodles first

With broth
Broth
I expected it to be like Nengmyun (Cold Noodles)
But it's not like that
That's a lot of noodles
I can see black spots on the noodles
It's tasty
The flavor is not strong
Pretty addicting
Yum
Boiled pork It looks delicious
It looks like pork feet
Dip a little
Too good
Stack it
Let's mix this up

There's some white stuff in here
It's meat
That's very interesting
I like the seasoning sauce
The sauce is really good
It's sweet and sour
Where does all of that go?
In my belly
Your parents must've gone through a lot to keep you fed
She ordered the meat and the pancake as well
I think this dumpling is made out of buckwheat too
Buckwheat dumplings
Yum
The broth is very interesting
I've never had anything like it
It's Tzuyang

Hello~
I'm a fan
Look at her, she's eating all of that
Go subscribe
Thank you
If you like strong flavors, I recommend the one without broth
If you like cold noodles, then I recommend this
The Buckwheat Noodles with Broth
That's not what I was expecting
I thought this would be a bone broth
But it's the water that was used for the noodles
It boiled buckwheat noodles
You can taste the buckwheat
It's not a flour noodle or the cold chewy noodle
It's unique and tasty
Chewy

The noodles would cut easily if it had too much buckwheat
But it has just the right amount
It's not too much or too less It's perfect
I personally prefer the one without the broth
It's my first time at a restaurant that specializes in buckwheat noodles
I can tell that it's different from any other buckwheat noodles
It has like kimchi and stuff in here
Mushrooms
It's thick
It's been hot lately
And this is very cool/refreshing
The dumplings are pretty average
A hand-made kimchi dumpling
It's my first time eating at a buckwheat restaurant
It was a different experience
The noodles were delicious

The elders will enjoy it more than the younger generation
I have to go do some work now, so I will end the simple mukbang here
Let's head out Thanks everyone~
[Chulwon Fire Station]
Today, I will be helping the fire fighters to install fire facilities
To the people that are in need of it
We will be installing detectors and fire extinguishers to reduce fire damage
Hello~
This isn't much, but
It's really nothing
Red ginseng
Thank you
I just learned this today too
This will operate properly since the indicator is on green
Take out the safety pin
Aim and spray

I've used this before
Practiced it in the military
You have to put it where you can reach it quickly
I think this is miraculous
Let's give her a round of applause
You need to raise your voice a little for them
This is Red Ginseng! Red Ginseng!
What?
I can't hear Red Ginseng
Red Ginseng
You're giving it to me?
Yes yes
Take out the safety pin
Aim the hose towards the fire and press
This detector will go off in case of a fire
If you press this

Press this at least once a month
I'm thankful that she's here to do this for us
It's nice to see a celebrity
[Installing it herself]
We're going now
You can stay seated sir
[Last place of the day]
He lives here by himself
He's in his 70's
We are here to let him know what to do in case of a fire
This is for you
Thank you
You put this on the floor
Take out the safety pin
Yes, take this out
Aim this towards the fire

And press
She's doing an excellent job Amazing
Tziyang
I'm so thankful
You can talk on the megaphone like this
Control the volume here
You can press this for the siren
If there is a fire
We're going to mount this on your wall
Throw this and this will crack open on the fire
I will take this to my neighbors if they have a fire
We're leaving now Take care
These are essential firefighting tools for early-stages of fire
And it is obligatory for all households
We got to film together today
to let everyone know how important it is to install these features

Especially for elders, those who live alone,
the ill, or even the ones that have trouble hearing
It can get really dangerous
If you don't have these installed at your home
I hope everyone takes this seriously
The famous star Tzuyang came all the way here to Chulwon
And helped us advertise the importance of these tools
I hope many will take into consideration in getting these products
These firefighters are always working hard and doing good deeds for the citizens
They are so awesome
It was only for 1 day, but it was very meaningful one
[For the safety and happiness of me and my family]
[Firefighting tools for households are compulsory]
[Let's go South Korean Firefighters!]
